zh.lifeSummary: 當Efa Verch Bleddyn於大約1025年出生在威爾士時，她的母親Lady26歲，母親Helena le Bon24歲。她於1041年與Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan在威爾士拉德諾斯爾結婚。他們至少是11個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1097年9月7日在威爾士丹比爾享年73歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Efa Verch Bleddyn于大约1025年出生在威尔士时，她的母亲Lady26岁，母亲Helena le Bon24岁。她于1041年与Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan在威尔士拉德諾斯爾结婚。他们至少是11个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1097年9月7日在威尔士丹比爾享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: Verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Efa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of several Anglicized forms of the Gaelic name Eithne . In the case of Queen Victoria's granddaughter Princess Ena (Victoria Eugénie Julia Ena,  1887–1969 ) it had a different origin: it was a misreading by the minister who baptized her off a handwritten note of the originally intended name   Eva .  In England, the name is remembered principally as that of the fearsome  Ena Sharples  in the television soap opera Coronation Street.  See also  Ina .

variants.name: Eithne
meanings: Traditional name, apparently from eithne ‘kernel’, which was used as a term of praise in bardic poetry. St Eithne was a daughter of King Laoghaire and one of St Patrick's first converts.

en.lifeSummary: When Efa Verch Bleddyn was born about 1025, in Wales, her mother, Lady, was 26 and her mother, Helena le Bon, was 24. She married Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan in 1041, in Radnorshire, Wales. They were the parents of at least 11 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 7 September 1097, in Denbighshire, Wales, at the age of 73.

fr.St. Clare, Monmouth, Wales: Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Efa Verch Bleddyn est née environ 1025, à Galles, sa mère, Lady, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Helena le Bon, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan en 1041, à Radnorshire, Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 11 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 7 septembre 1097, à Denbighshire, Galles, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Efa Verch Bleddyn um 1025 in Wales geboren wurde, war ihre Mutter Lady 26 und ihre Mutter Helena le Bon 24. Sie hat 1041 in Radnorshire, Wales Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 11 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 7. September 1097 im Alter von 73 Jahren in Denbighshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Efa Verch Bleddyn è nata il circa 1025 nel Galles, sua madre, Lady, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Helena le Bon, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan nel 1041, nel Radnorshire, Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 11 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 7 settembre 1097, nel Denbighshire, Galles, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Efa Verch Bleddynが約1025年にウェールズで生まれた時，母Ladyは26歳，母Helena le Bonは24歳であった。1041年にウェールズラドノーシュアイアでLord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも11人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1097年9月7日にウェールズデンビグhシュアイアで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Efa Verch Bleddyn(이)가 대략 1025년 웨일스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 어머니 Lady(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helena le Bon(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1041년 웨일스 라드노르실르에서 Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1097년 9월 7일 웨일스 덴비그h실르에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Efa Verch Bleddyn nasceu aproximadamente 1025, em Gales, sua mãe, Lady, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Helena le Bon, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan em 1041, em Radnorshire, Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 11 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1097, em Denbighshire, Gales, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Efa Verch Bleddyn родилась около 1025 г. в местности Уэльс, её матери по имени Lady было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Helena le Bon, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan в 1041 г. в местности радноршир, Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 11 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 7 сентября 1097 г. в местности денбаишир, Уэльс в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Efa Verch Bleddyn nació aproximadamente 1025, en Gales, su mamá, Lady, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Helena le Bon, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lord of Builth and Radnor Idnerth ap Cadwgan en 1041, en Radnorshire, Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 11 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1097, en Denbighshire, Gales, a la edad de 73 años.
